title: Phosphor icons not rendering on mobile devices
symptom: Icons are visible on desktop but completely invisible on mobile devices. This issue arose suddenly without any changes to the loading method.
not_this_if: Icons are visible on all devices
root_cause: The issue occurs because the source for fetching Phosphor icons from unpkg is no longer functioning correctly. This can lead to icons not being displayed on mobile devices while still appearing on desktop.
fix_steps: Change the icon fetching path from unpkg to jsdelivr
Refer to the Phosphor official GitHub page for the correct path
Test the application on mobile to ensure icons are visible
agent_instruction: Update the icon fetching path to jsdelivr and verify visibility on mobile.
